---
title: "Creating Orthoimages and Point Clouds"
id: assessment-spat-analysis
order: 140
summary: "Create an OBIA classification or classify dense point cloud data, then report and present the results."
modules:
  - module-hr-analysis
Goals:
  - module-goals-spat-analysis
materials:
  - materialspat-analysis-000
  - materialspat-analysis-00
  - materialspat-analysis-0
  - materialspat-analysis-3
  - materialspat-analysis-2
  - materialspat-analysis-6
activities:
  - activity-analysis-0
  - activity-analysis-1
  - activity-analysis-4
  - activity-spat-analysis-5
  - activity-analysis-5
  - activity-analysis-3
  - activity-analysis-6
labels:
  - self-check
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/spatial_analysis/assessment.md"
---

## Task

You can use the provided sample data or your own project data:

- Create an OBIA classification of the orthoimage you have produced.
- Write a short report and discuss the results.
- Alternatively or additionally, classify the 3D dense point cloud into ground data and vegetation data.
- Estimate the biomass volume.
- Prepare a short presentation, preferably online, with your main results and findings.

## Connected Module

- [Analysis of high resolution aerial data](../modules/module-hr-analysis.qmd)
